name: Chicken with Forty Cloves of Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart shallow baking dish, arrange the garlic, celery, carrots, and onions.
2. Add the chicken broth.
3. Sprinkle the vegetables with half of the dried tarragon and half of the black pepper.
4. Arrange the chicken in a single layer on top of the vegetables.
5. Sprinkle the chicken with the remaining half of the dried tarragon and half of the black pepper.
6. Cover the dish tightly with double thickness of foil.
7. Bake at 425°F until the chicken is no longer pink and the garlic is soft, about 1 hour.
8. Serve the chicken and vegetables in soup plates along with the pan juices.
9. Squeeze the soft garlic from the husks onto slices of warmed French bread and spread it like butter.
Servings: 6
